creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 201651
sysctlview new port .shar

sysctlview version 0.1

sysctlview is a gtk frontend for the sysctl mib.

WWW: https://gitlab.com/alfix/sysctlview

Built on FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r342978 GENERIC  amd64
tested by % portlint -A
and % poudriere testport -j 112Ramd64 -p default -i -o deskutils/sysctlview

Please commit it
Thanks, Alfonso
